name: bookish-pancake
install:
python3 --version && test -f docs/index.html && echo 'Static site ready — no package install required'
# Keep headless screenshot/print jobs off the shared Chrome profile so SingletonLock
# cannot block later browser sessions (or subsequent screenshot runs).
if [ -w /usr/local/bin/google-chrome ] || sudo -n true 2>/dev/null; then
  sudo tee /usr/local/bin/google-chrome >/dev/null <<'WRAP'
#!/bin/bash
CHROME_BIN=/usr/bin/google-chrome-stable
COMMON_FLAGS=(
  --no-sandbox --test-type --disable-dev-shm-usage
  --use-gl=angle --use-angle=swiftshader-webgl
  --password-store=basic --no-first-run --no-default-browser-check
  --class=google-chrome
)
is_oneshot=0
for arg in "$@"; do
  case "$arg" in
    --screenshot|--screenshot=*|--print-to-pdf|--print-to-pdf=*|--dump-dom) is_oneshot=1; break ;;
  esac
done
if [[ "$is_oneshot" -eq 1 ]]; then
  TMP_PROFILE=$(mktemp -d /tmp/chrome-oneshot.XXXXXX)
  trap 'rm -rf "$TMP_PROFILE"' EXIT
  exec "$CHROME_BIN" "${COMMON_FLAGS[@]}" --user-data-dir="$TMP_PROFILE" --window-size=1820,1100 "$@"
else
  exec "$CHROME_BIN" "${COMMON_FLAGS[@]}" --remote-debugging-port=9222 \
    --user-data-dir=/home/ubuntu/.config/google-chrome \
    --window-size=1820,1100 --window-position=50,50 "$@"
fi
WRAP
  sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/google-chrome
  # Clear any stale locks left by previous hung runs
  sudo rm -f /home/ubuntu/.config/google-chrome/SingletonLock \
             /home/ubuntu/.config/google-chrome/SingletonCookie \
             /home/ubuntu/.config/google-chrome/SingletonSocket 2>/dev/null || true
  echo 'Chrome oneshot screenshot wrapper installed'
fi

terminals.name: docs-server
terminals.description: Serves the docs/ portfolio site at http://localhost:8000 for local preview and visual checks.
